display.purpose: Page titles; largest element on a screen.

title.purpose: Email subjects, event titles, button labels, the active row.

body.purpose: Default UI text, email previews, descriptions.

mono.purpose: Shortcut chips, timestamps, counts, addresses only.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hovered rows and resting popovers/dropdowns. Barely there.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Command bar and modal dialogs — the one surface allowed to clearly float.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, button, and input state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one obvious action on a screen. Honey fill, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #d99a3c; color: #2c2c2c; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e6a64d; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a3c; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary .ds-kbd { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.10); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default for secondary and toolbar actions. Transparent until hovered.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #2c2c2c; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f0ede7; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a3c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search / Prompt Input
components.description: Text field and command-bar prompt. AA-safe placeholder, honey focus ring, no glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search or type a command…" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #2c2c2c; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #e3e3e3; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6b6b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #d99a3c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217,154,60,0.35); }

components.name: Triage Chip
components.description: Soft-filled urgency/action label. Semantic tint background, full-strength text. Never honey.
components.html: Urgent FYI Scheduled
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-chip--urgent { background: rgba(197,79,61,0.14); color: #a23a2c; } .ds-chip--fyi { background: rgba(98,133,179,0.16); color: #3f5f8c; } .ds-chip--scheduled { background: rgba(76,155,107,0.16); color: #357050; }

components.name: Email Row
components.description: Dense list row. Flat at rest, Lift shadow on hover, honey selection rail when active.
components.html:
Q3 planning — can we move to Thursday?Hi, following up on the deck — wanted to check if…
9:24
components.css: .ds-row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-row:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-row--active { background: #fdf8f0; } .ds-row--active .ds-row__rail { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: #d99a3c; } .ds-row__main { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-row__title { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #2c2c2c; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-row__preview { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b6b6b; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-row__time { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #6b6b6b; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Ghost row on the panel surface. Active item gets honey-ink text + leading honey rail.
components.html: InboxConnections
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; background: #f8f6f2; padding: 8px; border-radius: 10px; } .ds-nav__item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #2c2c2c; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav__item:hover { background: #efece5; } .ds-nav__item--active { color: #936420; } .ds-nav__item--active .ds-nav__rail { position: absolute; left: 2px; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: #d99a3c; } .ds-nav__item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a3c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Command Bar
components.description: The signature ⌘K surface. Floats above the app; prompt input + ghost result rows with mono shortcut hints.
components.html:
Reply to selected emailR
Find a free slot this weekF
components.css: .ds-cmd { width: 560px; max-width: 92vw; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); overflow: hidden; } .ds-cmd__input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e3e3; padding: 16px 18px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #2c2c2c; } .ds-cmd__input::placeholder { color: #6b6b6b; } .ds-cmd__input:focus { outline: none; } .ds-cmd__list { padding: 6px; } .ds-cmd__row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #2c2c2c; cursor: pointer; } .ds-cmd__row--active { background: #fdf8f0; } .ds-cmd__row--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 2px; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: #d99a3c; } .ds-cmd__kbd { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6b6b6b; background: #f4f1eb; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: SlotNest is the clean desk you sit down to at the start of the day — everything in its place, warm light from one side, nothing competing for attention. A keyboard-first command center for Gmail and Google Calendar, built for non-technical people first, so the interface must feel obvious before it feels clever. The tool disappears into the task; honey-amber is the single warm light marking the one thing to act on. Density is calm, not cramped — surfaces flat by default, depth only as a response to state. It rejects legacy webmail clutter, generic AI-SaaS chrome, and terminal power-tool elitism alike.
keyCharacteristics: Pure-white surface; warmth carried by the honey accent and type, never by a tinted background.
One accent (honey-amber) reserved for primary action, current selection, and focus — ≤10% of any screen.
Flat by default; shadow and elevation are state, not decoration.
Geist throughout — one family, multiple weights; Geist Mono for shortcuts, timestamps, counts, addresses.
Fixed rem type scale (no fluid clamps); tight 1.15–1.2 step ratio.
AA contrast everywhere, visible focus rings, full keyboard navigation as a first-class concern.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Honey appears on ≤10% of any screen and means exactly one thing: this is what to act on. If two honey elements compete, one is wrong. Triage urgency uses the semantic trio, never honey.

rules.name: The Warmth-In-The-Light Rule
rules.body: Warmth lives in the accent and the type, never in the background. The body surface is pure #ffffff. Tinting toward cream/sand is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No tiny uppercase tracked kickers above sections. Labels are sentence case at normal tracking.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are fixed rem, never clamp(). A heading that shrinks inside a sidebar panel looks worse, not better.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until the user touches them. If a card has a shadow before you hover it, the shadow is wrong. Depth is feedback, not styling.

dos: Do keep the body background pure white (#ffffff). Carry all warmth in the honey accent and Geist type.
Do reserve honey for one meaning per screen — primary action, current selection, focus — at ≤10% coverage.
Do use ink-dark text on honey buttons, never white.
Do darken muted text to clear 4.5:1 on white, placeholders included (#6b6b6b, not the pale shadcn default).
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; add shadow only as hover/lift state.
Do use Geist Mono for shortcut chips, timestamps, counts, and addresses — and nowhere else.
Do show keyboard accelerators visibly; make the fast path the default path, never the required one.
Do keep type at fixed rem with sentence-case labels.
donts: Don't tint the background cream/sand/parchment, or name a token --paper / --cream / --linen. Warmth is in the light, not the room.
Don't ship generic AI-SaaS chrome: no purple gradients, no hero-metric dashboards, no decorative glassmorphism, no gradient text.
Don't recreate Gmail/Outlook clutter: no toolbar soup, no nested menus, no anxiety-by-density.
Don't go terminal power-tool: no monospace-everything, no jargon, no expert-only affordances.
Don't use honey for triage urgency — that's the semantic trio's job (urgent / scheduled / fyi).
Don't put a border-left/border-right colored stripe on rows, cards, or chips. Use the honey selection rail only on the single active item.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections.
Don't nest a card inside a card.
Don't add ambient shadows or orchestrated page-load animation; product loads into a task.
